questions: Was the merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts correctly resolved with both branch intents preserved?
Are there any remaining conflict markers in the resolved file or elsewhere in the source?
Are there any inconsistencies introduced by the merge resolution?

answers.answer: Yes. The ticketsUsage() function correctly merges the HLX-342 ticket-ref improvements (ticket-ref nomenclature, --json on get, explanation footer, dynamic exitCode) with the staging --mode flag on the create command.
evidence: src/tickets/index.ts lines 14-29 show merged usage string with both ticket-ref and --mode changes
All imports from ticket branch (isHelpRequested, extractTicketRef, resolveTicket) resolve correctly

answers.answer: No conflict markers remain. Verified by searching for <<<<<<<, =======, and >>>>>>> in the file and across the entire src/ directory.
evidence: Grep for conflict markers in src/tickets/index.ts returned no matches
Grep for conflict markers across src/ directory returned no matches

answers.answer: One inconsistency found and fixed: the case-level create help (line 69) was missing the --mode flag that staging added to the top-level usage (line 20). Fixed by adding --mode to the case-level help string.
evidence: Line 69 (case-level help): was missing --mode, now fixed to include it

statement: Conflict resolution in src/tickets/index.ts is correct. Both branch intents preserved. Fixed one inconsistency: create case-level help now includes the --mode flag from staging. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
